title: cyathocalyx ramuliflorus
intro: Cyathocalyx ramuliflorus is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the hair-bearing cyathocalyx. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyathocalyx ramuliflorus include treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Cyathocalyx ramuliflorus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
